zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter於1420年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼巴利塔斯納時，他的父親Sir Richard Boteler25歲，母親Lady Catharine O'Reilly25歲。他於1434年與Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1464年6月13日在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利瑟萊斯瑟萊斯享年44歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter于1420年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼巴利塔斯納时，他的父亲Sir Richard Boteler25岁，母亲Lady Catharine O'Reilly25岁。他于1434年与Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1464年6月13日在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利瑟萊斯瑟萊斯享年44岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter was born in 1420, in Ballytarsna, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, Sir Richard Boteler, was 25 and his mother, Lady Catharine O'Reilly, was 25. He married Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll in 1434, in County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 13 June 1464, in Thurles, Thurles, County Tipperary, Ireland, at the age of 44, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter est né en 1420, à Ballytarsna, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, Sir Richard Boteler, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Catharine O'Reilly, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll en 1434, à County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1464, à Thurles, Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlande, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter 1420 in Ballytarsna, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Boteler 25 und seine Mutter Lady Catharine O'Reilly 25. Er hat 1434 in County Kilkenny, Irland Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Juni 1464 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Thurles, Thurles, County Tipperary, Irland und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter è nato il nel 1420 nel Ballytarsna, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Richard Boteler, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Catharine O'Reilly, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll nel 1434, nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 13 giugno 1464, nel Thurles, Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garterが1420年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーボーリタースナで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Botelerは25歳，母Lady Catharine O'Reillyは25歳であった。1434年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーでLady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carrollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1464年6月13日にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリースウルレススウルレスで44歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter(이)가 1420년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 바리타르스나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Boteler(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Catharine O'Reilly(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1434년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1464년 6월 13일 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 스를레스 스를레스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter nasceu em 1420, em Ballytarsna, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Richard Boteler, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catharine O'Reilly, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll em 1434, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1464, em Thurles, Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter родился в 1420 г. в местности баллитарсна, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Boteler было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catharine O'Reilly, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll в 1434 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 13 июня 1464 г. в местности турльс, турльс, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edmund Butler the MacRichard of Ossory, Knight of the Garter nació en 1420, en Ballytarsna, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Richard Boteler, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Catharine O'Reilly, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Catherine Kavanaugh O'Carroll en 1434, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 13 de junio de 1464, en Thurles, Thurles, County Tipperary, Irlanda, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
